plugins.label: fetch
plugins.slug: Access signals without subscribing to changes.
plugins.description: Allows accessing signals without subscribing to their changes in expressions.

plugins.label: peek
plugins.slug: Access signals without subscribing to changes.
plugins.description: Allows accessing signals without subscribing to their changes in expressions.

plugins.label: setAll
plugins.slug: Sets the value of all matching signals.
plugins.description: Sets the value of all matching signals (or all signals if no filter is used) to the expression provided in the first argument.

plugins.label: toggleAll
plugins.slug: Toggles the value of all matching signals.
plugins.description: Toggles the boolean value of all matching signals (or all signals if no filter is used).

plugins.label: attr
plugins.slug: Syncs the value of an attribute with an expression.
plugins.description: Sets the value of any HTML attribute to an expression, and keeps it in sync.

plugins.label: bind
plugins.slug: Creates a signal with two-way data binding.
plugins.description: Creates a signal (if one doesn’t already exist) and sets up two-way data binding between it and an element’s value.

plugins.label: class
plugins.slug: Adds or removes a class based on an expression.
plugins.description: Adds or removes a class to or from an element based on an expression.

plugins.label: computed
plugins.slug: Creates a computed signal.
plugins.description: Creates a signal that is computed based on an expression.

plugins.label: effect
plugins.slug: Executes an expression when signals change.
plugins.description: Executes an expression on page load and whenever any signals in the expression change.

plugins.label: indicator
plugins.slug: Creates an indicator for whether an SSE request is in flight.
plugins.description: Creates a signal and sets its value to `true` while an SSE request request is in flight, otherwise `false`.

plugins.label: init
plugins.slug: Runs an expression when loaded into the DOM.
plugins.description: Runs an expression when the element is loaded into the DOM.

plugins.label: jsonSignals
plugins.slug: Outputs a JSON stringified version of signals.
plugins.description: Sets the text content of an element to a reactive JSON stringified version of signals.

plugins.label: on
plugins.slug: Attaches an event listener to an element.
plugins.description: Attaches an event listener to an element, executing an expression whenever the event is triggered.

plugins.label: onIntersect
plugins.slug: Runs an expression on intersection.
plugins.description: Runs an expression when the element intersects with the viewport.

plugins.label: onInterval
plugins.slug: Runs an expression at a regular interval.
plugins.description: Runs an expression at a regular interval.

plugins.label: onSignalPatch
plugins.slug: Runs an expression when signals are patched.
plugins.description: Runs an expression whenever one or more signals are patched.

plugins.label: ref
plugins.slug: Creates a reference to an element.
plugins.description: Creates a new signal that is a reference to the element on which the data attribute is placed.

plugins.label: show
plugins.slug: Shows or hides an element.
plugins.description: Shows or hides an element based on whether an expression evaluates to `true` or `false`.

plugins.label: signals
plugins.slug: Patches signals into the existing signals.
plugins.description: Patches (adds, updates or removes) one or more signals into the existing signals.

plugins.label: style
plugins.slug: Sets inline styles on an element based on an expression.
plugins.description: Sets CSS styles on an element using either key-based or object syntax, and keeps them in sync with reactive signals.

plugins.label: text
plugins.slug: Binds the text content of an element.
plugins.description: Binds the text content of an element to an expression.

plugins.label: patchElements
plugins.slug: Patches elements into the DOM.
plugins.description: Patches elements into the DOM.

plugins.label: patchSignals
plugins.slug: Patches signals.
plugins.description: Patches signals.

plugins.label: clipboard
plugins.slug: Copy text to the clipboard
plugins.description: This action copies text to the clipboard using the Clipboard API.

plugins.label: fit
plugins.slug: Clamp a value to a new range
plugins.description: This action clamps a value to a new range. The value is first scaled to the new range, then clamped to the new range. This is useful for scaling a value to a new range, then clamping it to that range.

plugins.label: intl
plugins.slug: Internationalizes a value.
plugins.description: Internationalizes a value.

plugins.label: animate
plugins.slug: Animates element attributes over time.
plugins.description: Allows you to animate element attributes over time. Animated attributes are updated reactively whenever signals used in the expression change.

plugins.label: customValidity
plugins.slug: Adds custom validity to an element.
plugins.description: Allows you to add custom validity to an element using an expression.

plugins.label: matchMedia
plugins.slug: Matches a media query and stores the result in a signal.
plugins.description: Sets a signal to whether a media query currently matches, keeps it in sync on change, and resets the signal on cleanup.

plugins.label: onRaf
plugins.slug: Runs an expression on every animation frame.
plugins.description: Runs an expression on every `requestAnimationFrame` event.

plugins.label: onResize
plugins.slug: Runs an expression on element resize.
plugins.description: Runs an expression whenever an element’s dimensions change.

plugins.label: persist
plugins.slug: Persists signals in local storage.
plugins.description: Persists signals in local storage.

plugins.label: queryString
plugins.slug: Syncs query string params with signal values.
plugins.description: Syncs query string params to signal values on page load, and syncs signal values to query string params on change.

plugins.label: replaceUrl
plugins.slug: Replaces the URL in the browser.
plugins.description: Replaces the URL in the browser without reloading the page.

plugins.label: scrollIntoView
plugins.slug: Scrolls an element into view.
plugins.description: Scrolls the element into view.
plugins.contents:
// Icon: hugeicons:mouse-scroll-01
// Slug: Scrolls an element into view.
// Description: Scrolls the element into view.

import { attribute } from '@engine'

const SMOOTH = 'smooth'
const INSTANT = 'instant'
const AUTO = 'auto'
const HSTART = 'hstart'
const HCENTER = 'hcenter'
const HEND = 'hend'
const HNEAREST = 'hnearest'
const VSTART = 'vstart'
const VCENTER = 'vcenter'
const VEND = 'vend'
const VNEAREST = 'vnearest'
const CENTER = 'center'
const START = 'start'
const END = 'end'
const NEAREST = 'nearest'
const FOCUS = 'focus'

attribute({
  name: 'scroll-into-view',
  requirement: 'denied',
  apply({ el, mods }) {
    const opts: ScrollIntoViewOptions = {
      behavior: SMOOTH,
      block: CENTER,
      inline: CENTER,
    }
    if (mods.has(SMOOTH)) opts.behavior = SMOOTH
    if (mods.has(INSTANT)) opts.behavior = INSTANT
    if (mods.has(AUTO)) opts.behavior = AUTO
    if (mods.has(HSTART)) opts.inline = START
    if (mods.has(HCENTER)) opts.inline = CENTER
    if (mods.has(HEND)) opts.inline = END
    if (mods.has(HNEAREST)) opts.inline = NEAREST
    if (mods.has(VSTART)) opts.block = START
    if (mods.has(VCENTER)) opts.block = CENTER
    if (mods.has(VEND)) opts.block = END
    if (mods.has(VNEAREST)) opts.block = NEAREST

    if (!el.tabIndex) {
      el.setAttribute('tabindex', '0')
    }

    el.scrollIntoView(opts)
    if (mods.has(FOCUS)) {
      el.focus()
    }
  },
})

plugins.label: viewTransition
plugins.slug: Sets `view-transition-name` styles.
plugins.description: Sets the `view-transition-name` style attribute explicitly.
